quote: We celebrated survival without naming what it cost. And I don’t think we can afford to keep skipping that part.
author: Rev. Randy Lewis
socialPost:
In the journey of life, we often celebrate survival without acknowledging the cost. It's time to honor the truth of our experiences, embracing the resilience that comes from facing our history with courage and grace.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/unbroken

#Healing #Resilience #Truth #History
